title: relay.rs: Undo Follow actor mismatch if persona differs between add and remove
description: relay add stores only actor_uri, inbox_uri, and status — NOT which persona sent the Follow. relay remove builds the Undo Follow using whatever --persona is passed at remove time. If 'relay add --persona alice' is called but 'relay remove --persona bob' is called later, the Undo is signed by bob and references a follow_id containing alice's URI (https://domain/users/alice/relay-follow/ID). The remote relay will reject the Undo because the actor doesn't match the original Follow actor, leaving the relay still subscribed despite the local record being deleted. Fix: store the originating persona_id in the relays table and use it when constructing the Undo.
close_reason: Fixed: relay persona stored in DB, used for Undo. Migration v2->v3.
